_doc: Manually recovered board votes missing from extraction, found by the
2026-07 divided-tally audit (regex sweep of full meeting text vs votes
table). Root cause for cb1-2021-09-14: the land-use roll-call pages were
classified as attachments by the segmenter, so the extractor never saw
them. Each source_snippet is verbatim from data/interim text/OCR.
Applied by cb1.db.load_db after the main load; entries are validated
against cb1.models.Vote. The 'note' key is documentation only.
Known-unresolved: cb1-2021-09-14 has a 32-0-0 roll call near the River
Ring committee report whose motion attribution is ambiguous (possibly
the 1 Wythe IBIA permit, extracted with voice-vote 0/0/0 tallies);
left untouched. Sidewalk-cafe tallies in SLA letters (e.g. 23-13-1-1
on 2025-05-13) are per-license actions, out of scope for this table.

vote.motion_text: Support the committee's recommendation to vote NO WITH CONDITIONS on the River Ring application (C220062ZMK, N220063ZRK, C220064ZSK, N220065ZAK, N220066ZCK, N220067LDK, N220068ZAK, N220069ZAK, C220070ZSK)
vote.source_snippet: VOTE 1. A motion was made by Mr. Burrows to support the committee's recommendation to vote NO WITH CONDITIONS. The motion was seconded by Mr. Chesler. A roll call vote was conducted. The vote was: 15 "YES"; 20 "NO"; 1 "ABSTENTION". The motion failed

add.note: River Ring vote 2 of 2 - the operative ULURP recommendation

vote.motion_text: Support the recommendation to vote YES WITH THE COMMITTEE'S CONDITIONS on the River Ring application (C220062ZMK, N220063ZRK, C220064ZSK, N220065ZAK, N220066ZCK, N220067LDK, N220068ZAK, N220069ZAK, C220070ZSK)
vote.source_snippet: VOTE 2. A motion was made by Ms. Moskowits to support the recommendation to vote YES WITH THE COMMITTEE'S CONDITIONS. The motion was seconded by Ms. Bruzaitis. A roll call vote was conducted. The vote was: 20 "YES"; 15 "NO"; 1 "ABSTENTION". The motion was carried.

vote.motion_text: Approve with conditions the 79 Quay Street application (C 210166 ZMK, N 210167 ZRK)
vote.source_snippet: Recommendation for 79 QUAY STREET (C 210166 ZMK, N 210167 ZRK) - Ms. Teague noted that the committee recommends: Approval with conditions. A motion was made by Ms. Nieves to support the recommendation to APPROVE WITH CONDITIONS. The motion was seconded by Ms. Iglesias. A roll call vote was conducted. The vote was: 29 "YES"; 0 "NO"; 0 "ABSTENTIONS". The motion was carried.

add.note: Citywide Open Restaurants zoning text amendment

vote.motion_text: Support the committee's recommendation to DENY the Open Restaurants Text Amendment application (C 2021 Y0291)
vote.source_snippet: Recommendation for OPEN RESTAURANTS TEXT AMENDMENT (C 2021 Y0291) -A motion was made by Mr. Burrows to support the committee's recommendation to DENY the application. The motion was seconded by Ms. Iglesias. A roll on the vote was conducted. The vote was: 31 "YES"; 0 "NO"; 1 "ABSTENTION". The motion was carried.

vote.motion_text: Approve the Cannabis Review Committee report as written
vote.source_snippet: CANNABIS REVIEW COMMITTEE – Mr. William Vega, Committee Chair, report as written. • Mr. Vega requested a motion: To approve report as written. A motion was made by Mr. Chesler and seconded by Mr. Bruzaitis. The vote was 30 “Yes”, 6 “No”, 4 “ABSTENTIONS”; 0 “RECUSALS”.

vote.motion_text: Approve the Cannabis Review report as written
vote.source_snippet: Mr. Vega requested a motion to approve the Cannabis Review report as written. A motion was made by Ms. Del Teague, it was seconded by Mr. Simon Weiser. The vote was: 24 “YES”, 1 “NO”; 0 “ABSTENTIONS”; 0 “RECUSALS.”

add.note: procedural, kept so the divided-vote audit reconciles to zero

vote.source_snippet: ADJOURNMENT A roll call was taken to adjourn the meeting. The vote was: 29 "YES"; 1 "NO"; 0 "ABSTENTIONS"; o"RECUSALS".

add.note: procedural, kept so the divided-vote audit reconciles to zero

vote.motion_text: Approve the minutes of the June 24, 2020 Board Meeting
vote.source_snippet: Ms. Viera made a motion to approve the minutes of June 24, 2020 Board Meeting. The motion was seconded by Mr. Caponegro and carried. The roll call vote was: 29 "YES"; 0 "NO"; 1 "ABSTENTION" (Needelman); 0 "RECUSALS"
